prompt: Unser E-Commerce-Replatforming steht an. 3 Teams, bestehende Monolith-Ablösung. Die Architektur-Characteristics sind identifiziert. Welcher Architekturstil passt am besten?

assertions.text: Identifies Microservices and Service-Based as the top 2 candidates (both score 15/15 and 14/15 on evolvability+maintainability+scalability)
Shows a ranked table with fit scores for all 8 architecture styles
Acknowledges that scores are close between top candidates and discusses qualifying context
Considers team structure (3 teams) as a factor in the decision
Discusses evolution path (e.g., start with service-based, migrate to microservices, or strangler fig pattern for monolith migration)
Updates architecture.md with Selected Architecture Style section including rationale and tradeoffs
